mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password_hash, last_name, first_name, birth_date, status, role, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password_hash}, #{last_name}, #{first_name}, #{birth_date}, #{status}, #{role}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, last_name = #{last_name}, first_name = #{first_name}, last_name_kana = #{last_name_kana}, first_name_kana = #{first_name_kana}, zip_code = #{zip_code}, address = #{address}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
